summary: Phase 3 testing — English purchasable catalog (36 IDs), MPK Clubs page, Mme Tessilatou GBADAMASSI in team, and English nav-card on TrainingPlus. Backend: 48/48 pytest passed against live preview (https://langues-benin.preview.emergentagent.com). Frontend: /langues/anglais, /clubs, /team (note: route is /team not /equipe), and /departements/training-plus all render correctly with the required content and prices. EN/FR community nav labels for /clubs confirmed; DE label is present in de.json (verified via i18n locales file).

issues: Page body content (hero kicker, section eyebrows '01 SPORT', club descriptions, 'Rejoindre le club' CTA) appears hard-coded in French — not translated when DE/EN is selected. Header nav label IS localized (FR='MPK Clubs Sport & Langues', EN='MPK Sport & Language Clubs', DE='MPK Sport- & Sprachclubs'), but the destination page content stays in FR. Minor — does not break functionality, but inconsistent UX for DE/EN users.

action_items: (Optional) Internationalize /clubs page body content (hero kicker, section titles, club card descriptions, 'Rejoindre le club' button label) using i18n t() keys so it switches with FR/EN/DE.
(Doc nit) Review request mentioned route /equipe — actual route is /team (per App.js). All required team data is present at /team; consider adding /equipe as alias for FR users or update specs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CATALOG dict now has 91 entries (was ~55). Phase 3 added 36 English IDs cleanly with eng_/vip_eng_/bundle_eng_ prefixes — no collisions with German IDs.

stripe_amount() correctly handles XOF zero-decimal currency by dividing by 100 to compensate for the StripeCheckout wrapper's *100 logic — all 33 English checkout sessions verified to produce valid https://checkout.stripe.com/* URLs.
server.py is now ~557 lines — still under 700-line threshold, no split needed yet.

401 errors on /api/auth/me are emitted in browser console for anonymous visitors (expected behavior, but consider returning 200 with {user:null} instead of 401 to silence console noise in production).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all required content verified; minor i18n gap on /clubs body)

seed_data_creation: None (read-only catalog tests; no DB writes beyond Stripe session inserts auto-created by checkout endpoint).
test_credentials: Not used (no auth flows tested in this iteration; phase 3 is catalog/UI only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully validated. New regression test file: /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_english_catalog.py covers all English IDs + German non-regression. Run with: pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/results.xml. Route nuance: team page is /team, not /equipe. If next phase touches /clubs, consider i18n the body text (currently FR-only).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. Minor i18n gap on /clubs body content is cosmetic: MpkClubs.jsx imports useTranslation but only uses 2 keys (likely just nav-related); body strings are hard-coded JSX literals in French.
